name: Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in the mashed potatoes and vanilla extract.
4. Mix together the flour, cocoa, and baking soda.
5. Alternately add the dry mixture and milk to the butter mixture, blending well after each addition.
6. Stir in the chopped nuts.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
9. Cool the cake on a wire rack.
10. Frost with your favorite icing.
